definition:
1. to hinder  or prevent from  a thing, τινά τινος (Xenophon Historicus); with infinitive, ἀπ. τινὰ ποιεῖν to prevent from  doing, forbid to  do, μὴ ποιεῖν τι (Euripides) 
2. with accusative only, to keep off, hinder , (Oracle quoted in Herdotus Historicus): —;absolute to stop the way , (Thucydides):—;impersonal, οὐδὲν ἀποκωλύει there  is no hindrance , (Plato Philosophus) (ML)
